sglang.title: ci: bypass maintenance gate for PR Test on main
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
When CI maintenance mode is active, check-maintenance blocks runs that are not PRs with the bypass-maintenance label. PR Test scheduled runs and manual runs from main were incorrectly blocked (e.g. failed check-changes).
Changes

pr-test.yml: set workflow env SGLANG_PR_TEST_BYPASS_MAINTENANC

sglang.title: ci: add daily PR Test schedule at 12:18am PDT
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Adds a second schedule cron so PR Test also runs daily at 12:18am PDT (07:18 UTC).
Made with Cursor

sglang.title: [Qwen3.5] Fix broken pipeline parallelism layer splitting
sglang.author: alisonshao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Root cause: make_layers() in Qwen3_5ForCausalLM (#19670) was called without pp_rank/pp_size, so all PP stages instantiated every layer and loaded the full model (~66GB per GPU instead of ~33GB). Pipeline parallelism gave zero memory savings. This was masked on H200 (141GB) but OOMs on H100

sglang.title: [diffusion] fix picklingerror for diffusion models using diffusers backend
sglang.author: yhyang201
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Fix PicklingError caused by make_dataclass setting __module__ to "types", which crashes all non-T2I models (video, image-edit, 3D) at server startup when using the diffusers backend.
Remove --continue-on-error from diffusion GT generation CI workflow so failures are no longer silently sw

sglang.title: [Diffusion] Fix Sana corrupted output by removing spurious QK norm layers
sglang.author: ChangyiYang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Problem
The native SGLang Sana pipeline produced corrupted/garbled images. The output looked like a mess of random shapes with no semantic content.
Root Cause
SanaLinearAttention and SanaCrossAttention both had norm_q / norm_k RMSNorm layers that do not exist in the Sana checkpoint. These layers wer

sglang.title: Replace clamp_position with JIT kernel + platform dispatch
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add a CUDA JIT kernel (clamp_position.cuh) for computing decode positions: clamp(seq_lens - 1, min=0), templated on dtype (int32/int64)
Add Python JIT wrapper with @cache_once for module caching
Replace the single @torch.compile implementation in forward_batch_info.py with platform dispatch

sglang.title: Update pr-test.yml to remove the temp hack `- cron: '15 8 * * *'`
sglang.author: merrymercy

sglang.title: refactor: Remove dead code from utils/common.py
sglang.author: alphabetc1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
utils/common.py has accumulated several functions that no longer have any callers. They were left behind when their call-sites were refactored or removed in earlier PRs. This patch deletes them to reduce noise and keep the module lean.
Modifications
Remove the following unused functions/v

sglang.title: Fix jit-kernel unit test CI dependency install in pr-test workflow
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Updates .github/workflows/pr-test.yml so CUDA dependency install steps match the intended profiles:

B200 diffusion job: Drop IS_BLACKWELL=1 from the install invocation (rely on CUSTOM_BUILD_SGL_KERNEL / script defaults).
JIT-kernel unit test job: Run ci_install_dependency.sh diffusion inste

sglang.title: Update write-sglang-test skill: CUDA-only for common tests + prefer mock
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Add rule: backend-independent tests (HTTP middleware, abort, API routing, config parsing) should only register register_cuda_ci — no unnecessary register_amd_ci / register_cpu_ci since these tests don't exercise backend-specific code paths
Add rule: prefer unittest.mock.patch over launching

#34839

Updated the GSM8K correctness eval in the AMD CI pipeline to use the models-mi3xx-fp8-and-mixed.txt config list instead of models-mi3xx-fp8.txt. Addresses failure in mi355_2: LM Eval Small Models (B200-MI325)

co-authored by : @itej89
The following changes are performed:

The current codebase is modified to run DeepEP backend OOB on AMD GPUs without any issues.
FusedBatchedMoE kernels can run on AMD GPUs with float8_e

vllm.title: [Hybrid] calling get_mamba_groups() once at MambaCopyBuffers.create()
vllm.author: fuscof-ibm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Now get_mamba_groups() is called only once during MambaCopyBuffers.create() and the result is reused in both preprocess_mamba() and postprocess_mamba() rather than being recomputed on every batch.
Test Plan
python -m pytest tests/v1/worker/test_mamba_utils.py -v

vllm.title: [Core] Enable allreduce fusion by default for SM 10.3 (B300/GB300)
vllm.author: mmangkad
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Enable allreduce fusion by default for SM 10.3 (B300/GB300) by using is_device_capability_family(100) instead of is_device_capability(100) in enable_allreduce_rms_fusion.
Accuracy Test
vllm serve nvidia/DeepSeek-V3.2-NVFP4 \
  --tensor-parallel-size 2 \
  --tokenizer-mode deepseek_v32 \
  --

vllm.author: mmangkad
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Add benchmarked optimal all-reduce communicator config values for SM 10.3 (B300/GB300).
Depends on #37755 for allreduce fusion to be auto-enabled on SM 10.3.
Config Values



Config
ws=2
ws=4
ws=6
ws=8




CUSTOM_ALL_REDUCE_MAX_SIZES
4 MiB
4 MiB
8 MiB
4 MiB


SYMM_MEM_ALL_REDUCE_MAX_SIZES
4

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix pooling non-determinism from pinned prompt_lens aliasing
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
PR #37303 changed num_prompt_tokens in InputBatch from a plain np.zeros() array to a pinned-memory-backed numpy view (torch.zeros(..., pin_memory=True).numpy()).
get_pooling_metadata() calls torch.from_numpy(self.num_prompt_tokens[:self.num_reqs]), which creates a tensor that shares the underlying p

Follow-up for:

vllm.title: [CI] Skip ISAAC multimodal tests due to broken upstream HF model weights
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Skip isaac multimodal generation tests
The upstream HF repo consolidated weights from 3 shards into a single model.safetensors but left a stale model.safetensors.index.json referencing the old shard filenames, causing weight loading to fail
This was introduced by upstream repo commits on 2026-03-20

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Handle libsndfile sf_error(NULL) race condition in audio fallback
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes regression after: #37058
When multiple threads concurrently fail sf_open_virtual() on unsupported formats (e.g. MP4 bytes passed as audio), sf_error(NULL) may return 0 instead of the actual error code due to a global-state race in libsndfile. This caused code=0 LibsndfileError ("Garbled error
